_comment: Thresholds are percentage regressions that fail the gate. Latency/throughput are set wide because the gate runs on shared GitHub runners with --job short (3 iterations), which are noisy; allocation is byte-exact and hardware-independent, so it stays tight and is the primary signal. The baseline MUST be captured on the same runner class (ubuntu-latest) — a baseline from another machine makes the latency comparison meaningless.
